Title: The Green Planet
Actors: David Attenborough, Cong Liu, Freek Vonk
Plot: Plants live secret, unseen lives. But they are as aggressive, competitive and dramatic as animals - locked in life-and-death struggles for food and light, taking part in fierce battles for territory, and desperately trying to reproduce and scatter their young. Using pioneering new filmmaking technology and the very latest science, The Green Planet reveals this strange and wonderful world of plants like never before.
Country: United Kingdom, China, Germany, France, United States
Awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 1 win & 4 nominations total
